Class MusicArtist

  • java.lang.Object
    • MusicArtist
  • public class MusicArtist
extends java.lang.Object
    represent a music artist entry

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      MusicArtist​(java.lang.String name, java.lang.String description)
      constructs a new music artist

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addAlbum​(java.lang.String title, java.lang.String genre, int year, int trackCount)
      creates an album and adds it to the artist's discography
      void displayAlbums()
      prints each album of the artist, as well as the progress and status of the album
      java.lang.String displayInfo()
      displays a summary of artist info
      Album findAlbum​(java.lang.String title)
      find album in artist's discography using title
      java.util.ArrayList<Album> getAlbums()
      get the albums of the artist
      java.lang.String getDescription()
      get description of the artist
      java.lang.String getName()
      get name of the artist
      java.lang.String getProgress()
      get how many of the albums are completed
      boolean isCompleted()
      checks whether all albums of the artist is completed
      void removeAlbum​(Album album)
      removes an album from artist
      void setDescription​(java.lang.String description)
      set description of the artist
      void setName​(java.lang.String name)
      set name of the arist

    • Constructor Detail

      • MusicArtist

        public MusicArtist​(java.lang.String name,
                   java.lang.String description)
        constructs a new music artist
        Parameters:
        name - is the name of the artist
        description - description of the artist

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        public java.lang.String getName()
        get name of the artist
        Returns:
        name of the artist

      • setName

        public void setName​(java.lang.String name)
        set name of the arist
        Parameters:
        name - the new name of the artist

      • getAlbums

        public java.util.ArrayList<Album> getAlbums()
        get the albums of the artist
        Returns:
        the artist's albums

      • addAlbum

        public void addAlbum​(java.lang.String title,
                     java.lang.String genre,
                     int year,
                     int trackCount)
        creates an album and adds it to the artist's discography
        Parameters:
        title - title of the album
        genre - genre of the album
        year - year of the album
        trackCount - track count of the album

      • removeAlbum

        public void removeAlbum​(Album album)
        removes an album from artist
        Parameters:
        album - is the album to be removed

      • getDescription

        public java.lang.String getDescription()
        get description of the artist
        Returns:
        description of the artist

      • setDescription

        public void setDescription​(java.lang.String description)
        set description of the artist
        Parameters:
        description - is the new description of the artist

      • isCompleted

        public boolean isCompleted()
        checks whether all albums of the artist is completed
        Returns:
        true if all albums are completed, otherwise false

      • getProgress

        public java.lang.String getProgress()
        get how many of the albums are completed
        Returns:
        the progress of completing all albums

      • findAlbum

        public Album findAlbum​(java.lang.String title)
        find album in artist's discography using title
        Parameters:
        title - is the title of the album
        Returns:
        album when found, null if not found

      • displayAlbums

        public void displayAlbums()
        prints each album of the artist, as well as the progress and status of the album

      • displayInfo

        public java.lang.String displayInfo()
        displays a summary of artist info
        Returns:
        a string of the summary
